scenarios.name: Revision-aware decomposition
assertions: Layer 4 slices link back to explicit artifact revisions.

scenarios.name: Canonical truth boundary
assertions: Layer 5 remains the canonical publication surface.
Operational slices do not replace publication truth.

scenarios.name: Re-ingestion loop
assertions: Stale support can be detected after canonical changes.

non_goals: Treating Layer 4 as the publication source of truth
Copying full artifacts into Layer 3 durable memory
